Name:Breeding Pool
Types:Land Forest Island
S:Mode$ ETB | Execute$ TrigShockLandETB | TriggerDescription$ As CARDNAME enters the battlefield, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters the battlefield tapped.
A:AB$ Mana | Cost$ T | Produced$ G | SpellDescription$ {T}: Add {G}.
A:AB$ Mana | Cost$ T | Produced$ U | SpellDescription$ {T}: Add {U}.
Oracle:({T}: Add {G} or {U}.)\nAs Breeding Pool enters the battlefield, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters the battlefield tapped.
